zh.title: 以太坊/美元技术分析：短期温和上涨趋势
zh.content:
当前以太坊价格位于2141.34美元，较24小时低点2117.64美元回升，显示市场短期多头力量占优。日内价格在20日均线2082.01美元之上运行，说明整体趋势仍偏向多头，短期回调风险有限，但仍需关注区间高点2142美元附近的压力。  

MACD显示值为17.44，虽信号线未提供，但正值暗示动能偏向上涨。价格在均线上方且持续收高，短线买盘情绪稳定。然而缺乏RSI数据，使得超买或超卖状态难以判断，投资者应结合成交量及价格形态谨慎跟进。  

关键支撑位首先在20日均线2082美元，其次下探至近期低点2117美元，若价格跌破则可能引发更深回调。阻力位主要关注2142美元及2155美元，突破将可能开启进一步上涨空间，短线交易可以分批建仓方式参与。  

综合来看，短期内以太坊偏多震荡，建议投资者逢低关注多头机会，同时设置合理止损以应对快速波动。谨慎投资者可等待明确突破2142美元后再加仓，以降低行情反转风险。

en.title: Ethereum vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
Ethereum is currently showing moderate bullish momentum, trading at $2141.34, reflecting a 0.62% increase in the past 24 hours. Despite the limited daily price action, the cryptocurrency has been able to hold near its recent highs of $2142.02, a crucial level for determining the short-term outlook. The low of $2117.64 provides immediate support, suggesting that any dip toward this price could present a buying opportunity, provided the broader market sentiment remains positive.

Without a clear Relative Strength Index (RSI) reading or a signal from the MACD, the indicators are not offering immediate insights into overbought or oversold conditions. However, the MACD line at 17.44465 indicates some positive momentum, signaling that Ethereum could continue to climb if this trend persists. The absence of a signal line prevents the identification of a definitive crossover, leaving the market somewhat uncertain. Thus, traders should remain cautious and monitor the emergence of further indicator data to confirm the direction.

The 20-period Simple Moving Average (SMA) is currently positioned at $2082.0085, acting as a dynamic support level. Should Ethereum dip below this moving average, the price could face stronger selling pressure. In this scenario, support would be seen at $2117.64. On the upside, sustained momentum above $2142.02 may enable the asset to test higher resistance levels around $2180, a potential target for bullish traders.

In the short-term, traders should focus on price behavior near the $2117.64 support and $2142.02 resistance levels. A bounce off the support could trigger a buying signal with a target near the resistance zone. Conversely, a break below $2117.64 would likely warrant caution, potentially signaling a retracement back toward lower levels around $2080 or lower. Conservative traders may wait for clearer indicator signals before committing to any trades.
